title: Fix missing closing div tag in dashboard template
description: The dashboard HTML template was missing a closing tag for the stats container, causing layout corruption in the sidebar.
diff: diff --git a/templates/dashboard.html b/templates/dashboard.html index 6b7c8d9..e0f1a2b 100644 --- a/templates/dashboard.html +++ b/templates/dashboard.html @@ -42,6 +42,7 @@ {{ total_users }} Total Users +
comments: vera: Was wondering why the sidebar was broken. Good catch.
author: xena
